TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jim_Bostic, title = Jim_Bostic, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jim_Bostic} }

S.FORM: Jim Bostic sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1953 , ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 1, Jim Bostic, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Jim Bostic sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1953 , ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 1, Jim Bostic, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *im βos~ɕtiʦ~ʨ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *im βos~ɕtiʦ~ʨ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
